debug_info.goal:
case refine_1
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝³ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X Y : ι → Ω → E
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsSquareIntegrable ι Ω E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ mΩ X 𝓕 P
hY : @ProbabilityTheory.IsSquareIntegrable ι Ω E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ mΩ Y 𝓕 P
ω : Ω
⊢ IsCadlag fun x => X x ω + Y x ω

proof:
have := hX.cadlag ω
    have := hY.cadlag ω
    exact ⟨by
    intro x;
    have h_right_cont : ContinuousWithinAt (fun x => X x ω) (Set.Ioi x) x ∧ ContinuousWithinAt (fun x => Y x ω) (Set.Ioi x) x := by
      exact ⟨ ‹IsCadlag ( fun x => X x ω ) ›.right_continuous x, ‹IsCadlag ( fun x => Y x ω ) ›.right_continuous x ⟩;
    exact h_right_cont.1.add h_right_cont.2, by
      intro x
      obtain ⟨lX, hlX⟩ := ‹IsCadlag (fun x => X x ω)›.left_limit x
      obtain ⟨lY, hlY⟩ := ‹IsCadlag (fun x => Y x ω)›.left_limit x
      use lX + lY
      exact Filter.Tendsto.add hlX hlY⟩
successful_attempts:
have := hX.cadlag ω
    have := hY.cadlag ω
    exact ⟨by
    intro x;
    have h_right_cont : ContinuousWithinAt (fun x => X x ω) (Set.Ioi x) x ∧ ContinuousWithinAt (fun x => Y x ω) (Set.Ioi x) x := by
      exact ⟨ ‹IsCadlag ( fun x => X x ω ) ›.right_continuous x, ‹IsCadlag ( fun x => Y x ω ) ›.right_continuous x ⟩;
    exact h_right_cont.1.add h_right_cont.2, by
      intro x
      obtain ⟨lX, hlX⟩ := ‹IsCadlag (fun x => X x ω)›.left_limit x
      obtain ⟨lY, hlY⟩ := ‹IsCadlag (fun x => Y x ω)›.left_limit x
      use lX + lY
      exact Filter.Tendsto.add hlX hlY⟩
